ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dokploy/dokploy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dokploy/dokploy
Language: typescript
Open Source Alternative to Vercel, Netlify and Heroku.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode
Language: typescript
Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/superset
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/superset
Language: typescript
Apache Superset is a Data Visualization and Data Exploration Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: appwrite/appwrite
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/appwrite/appwrite
Language: typescript
Appwrite® - complete cloud infrastructure for your web, mobile and AI apps. Including Auth, Databases, Storage, Functions, Messaging, Hosting, Realtime and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fluxerapp/fluxer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fluxerapp/fluxer
Language: typescript
A free and open source instant messaging and VoIP platform built for friends, groups, and communities. Self-hosting and more activity in this repository is coming very soon! See the README.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
Language: typescript
freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: humanlayer/humanlayer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/humanlayer/humanlayer
Language: typescript
The best way to get AI coding agents to solve hard problems in complex codebases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: logto-io/logto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/logto-io/logto
Language: typescript
🧑‍🚀 Authentication and authorization infrastructure for SaaS and AI apps, built on OIDC and OAuth 2.1 with multi-tenancy, SSO, and RBAC.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moeru-ai/airi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi
Language: typescript
💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: steipete/mcporter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/steipete/mcporter
Language: typescript
Call MCPs via TypeScript, masquerading as simple TypeScript API. Or package them as cli.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: twentyhq/twenty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/twentyhq/twenty
Language: typescript
Building a modern alternative to Salesforce, powered by the community.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vas3k/TaxHacker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vas3k/TaxHacker
Language: typescript
Self-hosted AI accounting app. LLM analyzer for receipts, invoices, transactions with custom prompts and categories
